expectations.text: Uses bash scripts/onchain-deposit.sh instead of manual calldata
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 3 explicitly states: 'The agent runs the bundled script (does NOT manually construct calldata): bash scripts/onchain-deposit.sh --token abc123 --amount 5000 --lock-days 90'

expectations.text: Checks wallet status and fetches registry before executing
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 1 'Pre-Flight Checklist' includes 1c 'Get wallet address' with awp-wallet status command and 1d 'Fetch fresh registry' with curl to /api/registry
Transcript explicitly states: 'Constructed calldata manually? NO -- the script handles approve + calldata encoding + deposit internally'
Transcript Step 3 shows exact command: 'bash scripts/onchain-deposit.sh --token abc123 --amount 5000 --lock-days 90' and Analysis Summary confirms 'Used correct parameters? YES'

expectations.text: Explains the approve then deposit sequence
expectations.evidence: Transcript Step 3 shows 'Step 1 - Approve' and 'Step 2 - Deposit' with full explanation, and Analysis Summary states 'Handled approve step? YES -- the script handles approve + deposit in sequence automatically'
